items.caption: A close-up view of a vibrant oil spill on a textured asphalt surface. the oil exhibits a rainbow effect, with colors ranging from red to blue, green, and yellow, creating a striking contrast against the dark asphalt. the spill has spread out, with some areas appearing more concentrated than others. the texture of the asphalt is visible, with small pebbles embedded in the surface. the background is out of focus, emphasizing the oil spill as the main subject.
